title: claytonia rosea
intro: Claytonia rosea, also known as Pink Purslane or Red Maire, is a succulent plant species belonging to the family Portulacaceae. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, containing high levels of vitamins A and C, as well as minerals such as iron and calcium. The health benefits of Claytonia rosea include its potential to improve digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support heart health, due to its high antioxidant content. Claytonia rosea can be prepared as an herbal remedy through teas, infusions, and salves, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal treatment.
